title: Xtra Crunchy Malaysian Shrimp Paella
description: A quick-fix Malaysian dish featuring dry sherry and shrimp, cooked to a nutty and aerated perfection in a paella pan
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a paella pan over medium-high heat
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and set aside
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent
Add the dry sherry and cook until the liquid is almost completely evaporated
Add the calamansi juice, soy sauce, saffron threads, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine
Add the uncooked Arborio rice and stir to coat the rice with the oil and mix with the spices
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20 minutes
Return the shrimp to the pan and stir to combine with the rice
Increase the heat to high and cook for an additional 2 minutes to crisp the bottom of the paella
